hooks.command: bash -c 'PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python || command -v py); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/deadline-monitor.py" || exit 0'
bash -c 'PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python || command -v py); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/record-event.py" session_start || exit 0'
bash -c 'PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python || command -v py); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/record-event.py" prompt || exit 0'
bash -c 'PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python || command -v py); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/record-event.py" stop || exit 0'
bash -c 'PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python || command -v py); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/record-event.py" tool_use || exit 0'
bash -c 'PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python || command -v py); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/track-document.py" || exit 0'
bash -c 'PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python || command -v py); [ -n "$PY" ] && "$PY" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/track-search.py" || exit 0'
